approvedBy: Steve overnight-safe Foundation setup approval plus Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve asked Codex to make the call for the next setup sprint before the overnight queue and approved safe internal Foundation work that does not need external approval.
notes: Approved only for Foundation-owned protocol/proof work. Not approved: live extraction, auth-required or paid run, provider/model probe, connector/OAuth repair, Harlan/Fal/voice/Canva/OpenHuman feature work, broad UI redesign, Drive permissions mutation, Agent Feedback auto-send, external write, or model call.
